special_mechanics.name: Disorientation from impact
special_mechanics.description: Duncan becomes disoriented when walking into a wall or falling a short distance without jumping, causing him to circle around and mumble incoherently for a moment. Highly vulnerable during this state.

special_mechanics.name: Fall recovery mechanism
special_mechanics.description: Falling into holes does not result in death but leads to dungeon (Trouble 3). No instant death from falls.

special_mechanics.name: Rock and fireball trajectory
special_mechanics.description: Projectiles (rocks and fireballs) have controlled trajectory via mouse movement and clicks

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Qualitative data only. Source is Wikipedia article which provides gameplay mechanics description but no quantitative physics parameters. Genesis version (1991) is a port; original Macintosh version from 1986. Exact movement physics values not documented in available sources.
